scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace packages/core && npm run build --workspace apps/server && node apps/server/dist/index.js
scripts.simulate: npm run build --workspace packages/core && npm run build --workspace tools/simulators && npm run simulate --workspace tools/simulators
scripts.load:local: npm run build --workspace packages/shared && npm run build --workspace tools/load-test && npm run load --workspace tools/load-test --
